title: Non-record: compile-friendly state-space hybrid with attention anchors
author: greqone

data.description: Compile-friendly hybrid layout with exact attention anchors and S4D-style state-space blocks.
Exact attention blocks used as anchors in the hybrid layout.
S4D-style state-space mixer blocks with learned exponential depthwise convolution kernels.

novel_contributions: Non-record local sign-of-life submission for the state-space models wishlist lane
Compile-friendly hybrid architecture with exact attention anchors
S4D-style state-space blocks integrated into a standard train_gpt.py scorer path
Export policy that keeps ssm.* tensors in float16 to stay under the 16MB cap
Controlled comparison against an all-attention baseline on the full official validation split
